title: AL's Stone Creepers
description: A pack that adds Stone Creeper variants to caves!
body:
![Stone Creepers logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333c866f283a6ce9458a27d4027294759b39b47f.png)

# 

This pack that adds Stone Creeper variants to caves, making them more camouflaged!

The Stone Creeper variants are based on the Geomancer constructs from Minecraft Dungeons!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/oslcpuF-sus" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Note: While optional, this pack is recommended to be used alongside my other pack, AL's Creepers Revamped



Features:

*Stone Creeper variants have a % chance of spawning instead of the regular Creeper when in caves.

*The "Geomancer Wall" variant spawns at y=56-0

*The "Geomancer Bomb" variant spawns at y=0-(-64)



Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
